creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: Update issue to reflect latest (2012) state.

- Clarify summary to reflect problem as reported
- Reporter aimed to submit an updated patch (needs-patch)
- kib@ suggested two approaches (one a workaround, one a non trivial change for a minor case)

Request feedback from (hopefully still available reporter)

@Konstantin If your second non-trivial code change is unlikely to be accepted, we also have the option of closing Not Accepted based on what we have so far (a not accepted initial patch)
